'''vakata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doconazole|doconazole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doconazole|doconazole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vakata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækætæth|vækætæth]] || [[word:vækætæj|vækætæj]] || [[word:vækætæsh|vækætæsh]] || [[word:vækætæ|vækætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakatath|vakakatath]] || [[word:vakakataj|vakakataj]] || [[word:vakakatash|vakakatash]] || [[word:vakakata|vakakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakatath|vakatath]] || [[word:vakataj|vakataj]] || [[word:vakatash|vakatash]] || [[word:vakata|vakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakaftafth|vakaftafth]] || [[word:vakaftafj|vakaftafj]] || [[word:vakaftafsh|vakaftafsh]] || [[word:vakaftaf|vakaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakatatha|vakatatha]] || [[word:vakataja|vakataja]] || [[word:vakatasha|vakatasha]] || [[word:vakataka|vakataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakatath|vakatath]] || [[word:vakataj|vakataj]] || [[word:vakatash|vakatash]] || [[word:vakata|vakata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakatathal|vakatathal]] || [[word:vakatajal|vakatajal]] || [[word:vakatashal|vakatashal]] || [[word:vakatakal|vakatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakataathatha|vakataathatha]] || [[word:vakataajaja|vakataajaja]] || [[word:vakataashasha|vakataashasha]] || [[word:vakataaka|vakataaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakatathan|vakatathan]] || [[word:vakatajan|vakatajan]] || [[word:vakatashan|vakatashan]] || [[word:vakatakan|vakatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakatathaoro|vakatathaoro]] || [[word:vakatajaoro|vakatajaoro]] || [[word:vakatashaoro|vakatashaoro]] || [[word:vakatakaoro|vakatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
